qualifications.name: Diploma in ICT in Applications Development
notes: Additional UMP requirements: Minimum Admission Point Score: 24; Diploma endorsement; One additional language; Any other four modules.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of ICT
notes: NCV requirements: NCV level 4 in fundamental subjects; At least 60% for English; At least 60% for Mathematics; At least 70% in four vocational subjects relevant to Information Technology.
Articulation notes: Students with a Higher Certificate or Diploma in a relevant ICT course may be able to progress or articulate into the BICT in some cases.
Additional UMP requirements: Minimum Admission Point Score: 32; Bachelor endorsement.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Education in Foundation Phase Teaching
notes: Additional UMP requirements: Minimum Admission Point Score: 26 with Mathematics OR 27 with Mathematical Literacy; Preliminary admission is based on final Grade 11 examination results; Final admission is based on final Grade 12 results; The prescribed seven subjects are used to calculate APS; Life Orientation APS achievement rating is divided by two in the APS calculation; If an applicant included more than the minimum of three electives in the NSC, the four compulsory subjects and the best three electives will be used.
